task: Find full-time legal occupation jobs in San Diego County with a minimum salary of $4,000+ per month.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated from CA.gov to CalCareers, applied relevant filters for Legal Occupations and San Diego County, and reached a Job Search Results page showing 3 matching jobs. The visible results page explicitly showed all three jobs in San Diego County with Work Type/Schedule listed as Permanent Fulltime and salary ranges well above $4,000/month: Administrative Law Judge ($10,588-$15,263), Deputy Attorney General IV ($11,993-$16,096), and Deputy Attorney General Supervisor ($13,203-$17,727). The agent also extracted the correct posting URLs. Although the salary and full-time filters were not visibly confirmed as applied in the filter chips, the resulting listings themselves clearly satisfy the user's requested criteria, so the task outcome is complete.
final_result_response:
I found 3 matching CalCareers jobs:

| Job | Salary/month | Work type | Location | Deadline | Link |
|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| Administrative Law Judge | $10,588-$15,263 | Permanent Fulltime | San Diego County | 5/29/2026 | https://www.calcareers.ca.gov/CalHrPublic/Jobs/JobPosting.aspx?JobControlId=517840 |
| Deputy Attorney General IV | $11,993-$16,096 | Permanent Fulltime | San Diego County | 6/1/2026 | https://www.calcareers.ca.gov/CalHrPublic/Jobs/JobPosting.aspx?JobControlId=516511 |
| Deputy Attorney General Supervisor | $13,203-$17,727 | Permanent Fulltime | San Diego County | 5/13/2026 | https://www.calcareers.ca.gov/CalHrPublic/Jobs/JobPosting.aspx?JobControlId=516475 |

Search path used: CA.gov → State careers → CalCareers, filtered for Legal Occupations and San Diego County. All 3 results meet the full-time and $4,000+/month salary requirements.
action_history: Opening California website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.ca.gov/');
Opening advanced job search: await page.locator('e16').click();
Opening job category filter: await page.locator('e21').click();
Selecting legal job category: await page.keyboard.type('Legal');
Selecting legal job category: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Selecting San Diego location: await page.locator('e25').click();
Selecting San Diego location: await page.keyboard.type('San Diego County');
Selecting San Diego location: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Selecting full-time schedule and salary: await page.locator('e33').click();
Selecting full-time schedule and salary: await page.keyboard.type('Full Time');
Selecting full-time schedule and salary: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Selecting full-time schedule and salary: await page.locator('e35').click();
Selecting full-time schedule and salary: await page.keyboard.type('4000');
Selecting full-time schedule and salary: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
